rationale_per_step.add-verify-npm-script: DX/Infra: add a single 'verify' npm script that runs the full canonical pre-PR verification command (lint && typecheck && build && the complete eval:smoke chain). Makes the documented verify flow in AGENTS.md a one-command op. Rebalances after testing skew; zero risk, immediate DX value for harness and contributors.
rationale_per_step.surface-research-freshness-ux: Feature improvement / UI/UX + agent research: surface research run started_at/completed_at (and duration) in ResearchViewer or ResearchSummary header. Users currently see company.last_synced_at (hero/card) but not freshness of the deep research intelligence itself. Advances evidence-backed + fresh outcomes and trust.
rationale_per_step.expand-research-eval-scenarios: Testing/Observability: expand scenario coverage in research-orchestrator-mock-eval (or add lightweight checks) for result shape, non-empty sources, metadata presence, and basic non-obvious signals. Directly closes more of the measurable research quality + reliable deep research loop from vision. Builds on existing hermetic mock pattern.
